metadata.description: Skills and plugins published by the ArtificiallySocial org.

plugins.name: system-check
plugins.description: Quick health check of the local development environment — memory, load, disk, Claude processes — bundled with cleanup-claude-procs for escalation when stray Claude sessions are detected.

plugins.name: pushover
plugins.description: Send push notifications to phone/desktop via the Pushover API using a bundled bash helper. Reads credentials from PUSHOVER_TOKEN / PUSHOVER_USER env vars.

plugins.name: kitty-cli-display-image
plugins.description: Display an image in the terminal via the Kitty graphics protocol — fixed overlay window, sized to the terminal with borders, dismissible with any key or --dismiss.
